name: Spanakopita
recipeInstructions:
If using fresh spinach, wash the spinach and remove the rough stems. Place in a large bowl and sprinkle heavily with salt. Rub the salt into the leaves by picking them up, a bunch at a time, and rubbing them between your hands; the volume of spinach will decrease drastically as you do this. Tear the spinach as you do this. Rinse the salt off thoroughly and dry the spinach, squeezing it in bunches in a towel. (If using frozen spinach, just let it thaw and squeeze out the excess moisture.)
Saute the onion and mushrooms in olive oil and butter with minced garlic and season with salt and pepper to taste until both onions and mushrooms are tender.
Remove from heat. Beat eggs in a large bowl and crumble in feta cheese. Add grated Parmesan, spinach, sauteed onions, mushrooms, parsley, Organo seasoning, dried rosemary (if using), freshly ground pepper, and a little salt (remembering the feta is very salty).
